Localization.Description: A user started an application debugger

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} started the application debugger {object.process.name} that remotely accessed host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} started the application debugger {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}. Process command line: {object.process.cmdline}.
